feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Need a Hand
entry.summary:
Author: Lord_Kakarot

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 938Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: In the Batcave, Superman seeks solace from Batman after relationship troubles with Lois, leading to an intimate encounter where Bruce uses a specialized machine and his own hands to relieve a pent-up Clark's. The night ends with Clark offering future favors in exchange for more sessions, strengthening their unique bond over a shared meal.

entry.title: Too Little, Too Late
entry.summary:
Author: MySkateboardsGripTape

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,973Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: “So, sir.” Alfred asks gently and carefully, “Have you spoken to master Kent?” Bruce's chest tightened at the reminder that he had been avoiding the big blue man since his wedding to Lois. A grimace flickers across his face. “Well…Alfred, I spoke to him last night in passing while on patrol,” he replied, voice steady, hoping for the conversation to be dropped despite knowing damn well Alfred won't let it. ”And what did you do, sir?” Alfred pressed lightly, while keeping his gaze politely to the shelves to decrease the pressure Bruce may be feeling from the topic. Understanding the sensitivity of the topic. Of Clark. “I tried to act like I didn’t notice him,” Bruce admitted. “A pathetic attempt since he can hear my heartbeat…” Bruce looked slightly defeated at the reminder of the whole scenario. “It betrayed me.” or Bruce yearns for Clark the whole fic and drowns in regret...

entry.title: Free Fall
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,529Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 48

Summary: Bruce Wayne has been maintaining a file. It is eleven pages, encrypted, labeled TLI — Tactical Liability Index, and it has absolutely nothing to do with tactics. Clark Kent has been paying attention. These are, it turns out, related problems. (Or: Bruce spends eight months filing his feelings under increasingly implausible headings. Clark waits him out. Alfred makes the Sumatran. Nobody is surprised except Bruce.)

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,330Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 88

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: In The Wee Small Hours Of The Morning
entry.summary:
Author: fartsmellyman

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,052Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 44

Summary: He pressed his thumb against the card in his pocket. It moved over the embossed letters in an absent act of reverence. Bruce Wayne. He'd call about the interview, he decided. That was the right thing. The professional thing to do for both of them. He would call, and he would be a journalist, and he would not think about the bathroom or the heartbeat or the way Bruce had gone still and careful the moment Clark had pulled back, asking "Do you want to stop? " like what he wanted really mattered, even if Bruce looked like he wanted to take, like Clark's answer was the only important thing weighing on him.He would absolutely not think about that. Or: Superman and Batman meet properly for the first time; Clark does not handle it as gracefully as he should, the heartbeat memorization wasn't on purpose, and he would like everyone to stop looking at him like that.

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,137Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.title: ʞuıl ʎɥɔʇǝʞs ɐ ʞɔılɔ noʎ uǝɥʍ suǝddɐɥ ʇɐɥʍ sı sıɥʇ 'ǝǝs
entry.summary:
Author: RenkonNairu

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,475Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 48

Summary: Clark Kent is an investigative journalist who's articles have placed three billionaires under legal scrutiny already. Once was lucky, twice was a coincidence, but three times is a pattern and people have already dubbed Kent the 'Billionaire Breaker' for his exposes on the upper class. Brucie Wayne is a billionaire with a secret and he does not want the Billionaire Breaker discovering it. Under the guise of flirting, Brucie texts Clark a link and when the flustered farm boy opens it, the link opens a backdoor hack into his phone. But Batman discovered much more than he expected in the Metropolis reporter's phone. Clark Kent's tech is more advanced than anything else on Earth. Its almost as if Clark is... an alien

entry.title: Joyride
entry.summary:
Author: TheCrimsonCritic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,130Chapters: 2/9Kudos: 19

Summary: "As if the man could sense Bruce’s ogling, Clark looked directly at him as the bull jerked particularly hard, sending the reporter’s back into a sinuous arch. Bruce was a man who had a turbulent “relationship” with Clark, but he was still just a man. A man who wanted the reporter-turned-mechanical-bull rider. Bad." OR Bruce sees Clark ride a mechanical bull at a themed gala wants Clark's cookie BAD. Before AND after discovering Clark's identity as Superman.

entry.title: The Phantom Robin
entry.summary:
Author: Scarletred1990

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,400Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 782

Summary: Danny wasn't a Fenton. He wasn't their original child, in fact, he was their nephew. A nephew they lied to. They thought they were helping him, but all it did was cause him to resent them. Cause him to run away. He needed to fix this mistake he unknowingly made.Dick wasn't a Wayne, but he liked pretending to be. It felt better than remembering that he was abandoned by someone he thought he could trust. Someone he thought would never leave his side. Someone who wasn't there for their deaths.Yet, they couldn't stay away from each other for too long. After all, they were two halves of the same whole.

entry.title: You can take the boy from the circus
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,257Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 473

Summary: Damian Al-Ghul Wayne had everything at one point. He was a prince. Ibn al Xu'ffasch. Son of the bat. Heir to the demon. He had never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his palace in Nanda Parbat. He had never asked to be shipped to a gloomy, grey city. Even when his father kept taking in orphans and ruining his plans for inheritance, Damian stood steadfast. But then his father died, leaving behind his newest orphan. A tiny acrobat with watery blue eyes and black curls, who spoke no English. Damian knew the boy never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his circus troupe. Damian knew he needed to be there for him.

entry.title: Yes, He's Sleeping On The Couch
entry.summary:
Author: NotCassia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,826Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 120

Summary: The leaks began two weeks ago. Lasted only a day and never happened again. |030226/1029700017-emulated storage-AUD| [Superman: «You do know that I meant what I said, right?»... Superman: «That I don't regret sharing my second name with you and Diana»— Batman: —«Wonder Woman.»... Superman: «...B» Batman:—«I'm well aware Superman. You rarely leave room for doubt.» Silence persists for a long moment before it is broken by Superman Superman: «You said telling me your real name wouldn't improve our synergy earlier. You sounded pretty sure of it.» Batman: «I'm almost always certain.» Superman: «It sounded like your unique way of telling me I wouldn't like you if I knew you.»... Superman: «I would.»... Batman: «You're a hopeful man, Kal.»]   >>Supergirl's Wench@supergirl_swench when im in a die hard pinning for my emotionally constipated best friend competition but my opponent is Superman😔💔29k likes 98 replies Or conversations through private league channels are leaked to the public, shenanigans ensue

entry.title: HAIL MARY
entry.summary:
Author: sleepyteatimebear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,751Chapters: 9/32Kudos: 67

Summary: Clark 'Superman' Kent, is a shoe-in for the NFL draft, a tall, dimpled, All-American-Type, College Football's Jesus. Bruce is well-known for his intense dedication to collegiate journalism, his all-black closet and the billions promised to him upon graduation. Bruce wants to sweep at the Collegiate Emmy's, Clark wants to go pro. So, they make a deal. Bruce can produce a media campaign that rallies the public behind Clark before Draft Day. Bruce helps to upkeep the Wayne Media Enterprise legacy, and Clark gets good press. But then, Clark and Bruce spend game-day after game-day together. Bruce asks Clark questions, studies him, captures him, writes all of him down. What's even more peculiar is Clark starts asking questions back. Questions that make Bruce feel like Clark wants to know him as more than just his shadow for the season. They can’t fall in love. It wouldn’t make practical sense. It wouldn’t make emotional sense. But couldn't it?

  • Annoyances to Friends to Lovers
  • One-Sided Annoyance
  • It's Bruce
  • He's the only one annoyed

  • Bruce Falls Harder

entry.title: A Little Spider Caught up in a Hood
entry.summary:
Author: FayeVilla418

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,194Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 137

Summary: Peter wakes up to green. He died. But he's alive. And in another universe too, neat. He breaks out of the glass tube He was in, goes feral, attacking the scientists that had him locked up. He has turned into more of a spider, he never used to have fangs or venom. The door gets broken down while Peter's jaws are still clamped down on a quickly fading flailing kidnapper. It's Red Hood. Red Hood takes in the situation and decides to take Peter, keep him at a safe house, under lock and key, away from the bats, who had gotten to the Lazura's pit just after Jason had left. Peter tries to accept these new changes and this new universe, knowing that there was almost absolutely no way back. And no one would look for him either. At least he has Jason. But the bats break into the safe house Pete's staying at and immedietly assume that Peter is Jason's bf. Anytime they try to deny it, it just feeds into their assumption. Oh well.
